category_sources: source_facts.description says "Colored logcat script to show entries only for specified app".
source_facts.homepage is the official pidcat repository by Jake Wharton.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the project name pidcat.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README at source_facts.homepage is the best official documentation surface for pidcat.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/JakeWharton/pidcat, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies colored logcat output filtered by app.
source_facts.executables lists the pidcat CLI executable.
